title: Solar Tracker Market Size, Share and Growth Analysis
text: Array Technologies is among prominent players in solar tracker market alongside NEXTracker, Trina Solar, and others. Array's top competitors include Nextpower Inc (NASDAQ: NXT), China's Arctech Solar Holding Co Ltd, and Spanish operator Soltec Power Holdings SA. NEXTracker has largest market share in world, acquiring contracts from countries throughout globe. Solar tracker market is led by major players such as NEXTracker, Array Technologies, Trina Solar, Soltec, Arctech Solar, and SunPower. For full year 2025, Array's revenue jumped 40% to US$1.28 billion, propelled by 35% more tracker shipments and recent APA Solar acquisition. In August 2025, ARRAY acquired APA Solar, provider of solar racking and foundation solutions, strengthening its position as fully integrated solar infrastructure supplier. Company faces challenges from tariffs raising part costs, benefits from past tax credits fading and squeezing margins, supply chain issues and competition from other trackers. Global solar tracker market size valued at USD 10.79 billion in 2025 and projected to grow from USD 12.80 billion in 2026 to USD 40.70 billion by 2034, exhibiting CAGR of 15.56%.
